posts.author: Anonymous
posts.body: Predictions: 1 of 8 Pending | Tied for 1st with 342 others I actually like Dubois here at first thought. Wardley gets hit a lot and is not a good minute winner. Often relying on big moments of power to cause a momentum shift. Dubois hits nearly as hard and is a better technical boxer. Still gotta watch tape on this one though.
